title: ExpertRoundtable
description: Stage-5 moderated expert discussion: the 4 experts react to each other, the anonymized persona distribution, and the skeptic's case, then converge on the top recommendations. SYNTHESIS ONLY — this output feeds the Google Doc + recommendations, never scorecard.mjs (the score is already fixed by the blind + adversarial verdicts).

turns.description: The moderated dialogue, in order. Make disagreement real and screen-specific; each expert speaks to their actual verdict lean.

text.description: In-character turn; cite specific screens and react to others.

topRecommendations.description: The recommendations all experts sign off on, priority order. Each ties to specific screens and names the rubric checks it lifts.
